title: Add Ant Pest Types (Black, Red, Army, Carpenter) With Educational Content + Icons

requirements.summary: Create four new ant educational content React components following existing cards + alerts layout, including safety and carpenter structural-damage cautions.
acceptanceCriteria: New React components exist under frontend/src/components/pests/ for all four ant types and are exportable (consistent with other *Content.tsx components).
Each ant component includes sections for identification, habitats/attractants, prevention, and what to do if found, written in English.
Carpenter Ants content includes a clear warning about potential wood/structural damage and advises when to contact a licensed professional.
Content includes a safety note about stings and seeking medical care for severe reactions/allergies (as appropriate) without claiming medical diagnosis.

file_operations.description: Add Black Ants educational content component using existing shadcn-ui Card/Alert patterns (cards + alerts) and clear English sections: identification/signs, habitats/attractants, prevention, and what to do if found; include an appropriate sting/allergy safety note. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add Red Ants educational content component using existing shadcn-ui Card/Alert patterns (cards + alerts) and clear English sections: identification/signs, habitats/attractants, prevention, and what to do if found; include a prominent sting/allergy safety note (without medical diagnosis language). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add Army Ants educational content component (treat any reference to "arm ants" as "army ants") using existing shadcn-ui Card/Alert patterns and clear English sections: identification/signs, habitats/attractants, prevention, and what to do if found; include an appropriate sting/allergy safety note. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add Carpenter Ants educational content component using existing shadcn-ui Card/Alert patterns and clear English sections: identification/signs, habitats/attractants, prevention, and what to do if found; include a prominent structural/wood-damage caution and guidance on when to contact a licensed professional, plus an appropriate sting/allergy safety note. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Integrate the four ant types into EducationalContent pest selection and conditional rendering across Identify/Habitats/Prevention/Treatment tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: EducationalContent.tsx includes the four new ant pests in the selectedPest state union/type and updates the default/rendering logic accordingly.
The pest selection grid includes buttons for each new ant type with clear labels in English.
Selecting each new ant type renders the correct corresponding ant content component in Identify/Habitats/Prevention/Treatment tabs (and bedbugs behavior remains unchanged).

file_operations.description: Update the selectedPest union/type to include blackants, redants, armyants, and carpenterants; import and wire the four new *Content components into the existing renderPestContent switch; add four new selection buttons consistent with the existing grid/button pattern so each tab renders the correct component when selected while keeping bedbugs behavior unchanged. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add four static ant icon assets and display them in the pest selection controls with accessible alt text and consistent sizing.
acceptanceCriteria: Four icon files are present under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filenames specified in the image requirements.
The new pest selection buttons use the new icons via and include appropriate alt text for accessibility.
Icons render correctly at the same size and style as the existing pest icons in the selection grid.

file_operations.description: Add the generated static icon asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/black-ant-icon.dim_128x128.png (128x128, transparent background) for Black Ants selection control.
Add the generated static icon asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/red-ant-icon.dim_128x128.png (128x128, transparent background) for Red Ants selection control.
Add the generated static icon asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/army-ant-icon.dim_128x128.png (128x128, transparent background) for Army Ants selection control.
Add the generated static icon asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/carpenter-ant-icon.dim_128x128.png (128x128, transparent background) for Carpenter Ants selection control.

Update the four new ant selection buttons to use the new static icons via tags (served from frontend/public/assets/generated) with appropriate English alt text and the same size/style classes used by existing pest icon buttons for consistent rendering. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
